offer: For Etsy sellers processing 5–15 invoices/month, delayed invoicing causes cash flow gaps. We automate billing instead of manual invoicing and payment tracking using spreadsheets.
problem: Cash flow gaps due to delayed invoicing and payment processing.
channels_free: Post in Reddit communities for Etsy sellers
